summary: Iteration 55 - Calendar Refinements Testing Complete. Backend: 20/20 tests passed. Frontend: All key features verified working. Member file upload endpoint works for PDF/PPT/DOC. Mentorship slots support title field. CMS Global Events has List/Calendar view toggle. CMS Mentorship Schedule has Title column. Event detail page renders rich text without horizontal scrollbar. AUX Calendar visible in sidebar, Mentor Calendar removed.
seed_data_creation: Test slots created during backend tests (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Calendar refinements fully tested. Key features verified: 1) POST /api/member/upload-file accepts PDF/PPT/DOC files for member accounts, 2) Mentorship slots support 'title' field in create/update, 3) GET /api/member/mentor-calendar hides virtual_link for non-booked members (code verified), 4) Waitlist members kept (not deleted) when registered member cancels (code verified), 5) Cancellation notification for slots says 'cancelled by the mentor' (code verified), 6) GET /api/admin/calendar/events/{id}/registrations/csv includes event title and date in header row, 7) CMS Global Events has List/Calendar view toggle with data-testid='events-list-view' and 'events-cal-view', 8) CMS Mentorship Schedule has Title column and Title field in editor with data-testid='slot-title', 9) My Account Mentorship Profile shows empty state when no mentor assigned (admin doesn't have mentor), 10) Mentor Calendar sidebar item removed; AUX Calendar visible in sidebar, 11) Event detail page renders rich text description without horizontal scrollbar.

backend_apis.GET /api/admin/mentorship/slots: PASS - Returns slots with title field
backend_apis.GET /api/member/mentor-calendar: PASS - Returns slots, virtual_link hidden for non-booked
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/calendar/events/{id}/regi: PASS - CSV includes event title and date

frontend_cms.Calendar view displays events: PASS - Events shown on monthly calendar
frontend_cms.Title column in slots table: PASS - Title column found in table header

frontend_myaccount.Mentorship Profile page: PASS - Shows empty state when no mentor assigned
frontend_myaccount.Rich text description: PASS - Description renders with proper formatting
frontend_myaccount.No horizontal scrollbar: PASS - Text wraps correctly without overflow
